title: Custom Computer Programming Services

narrative.executive_view: This packet preserves the frozen customer-specific application-development archetype and records unresolved target-specific primitives without producing a score, action, gate, or verdict.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No target financial statements, accrual revenue policy, or documentation of outside-provider consideration was supplied; recognized revenue and controllable value added therefore remain missing.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen employee and controllable-contractor role taxonomy is retained as a source-free assumption, but no target evidence identifies removable recurring cash cost.
narrative.implementation: No target workflow evidence establishes adoption, integration, control requirements, realized savings, or investment timing over the five-year horizon.
narrative.commercial_capture: No selected-archetype contract, pricing, renewal, or competitive-response evidence supports a commercial-retention schedule separate from accounting pass-through.
narrative.buyability: No evidence establishes sale availability, buyer access and win share, or the separately scoped deal-execution and integration-onboarding capacities.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No target-comparable entry multiple, canonical normalized year-five state, or downside anchor evidence was supplied for a valuation-resilience primitive.
narrative.operator_survival: No exhaustive fixed-base service basket reconciled to controllable value added was supplied, so constant-price operator-controlled demand survival remains missing.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: Selection uncertainty is frozen in the specification and every target-specific economic primitive remains unsupported; missingness is preserved rather than imputed.

scenario_narratives.low: No supported downside scenario can be constructed because revenue, realization, retention, capacity, valuation, and survival primitives are missing.
scenario_narratives.base: No supported base scenario can be constructed; the packet does not substitute neutral values for unavailable target-specific evidence.
scenario_narratives.high: No supported upside scenario can be constructed because missing primitives retain their full unresolved domains rather than fabricated endpoints.

sources.title: 2022 NAICS definition and cross-references for 541511
sources.what_it_supports: Industry identity only; it does not support target-specific economic primitives.

n_band.rationale: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $292,242 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541511); class <5: 45,975 firms, avg revenue/firm $413,913 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $64,777 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 6,238 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,817,988 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $284,515 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 4,153 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,749,458 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $586,790 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 4,523 firms, avg revenue/firm $11,255,622 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,761,505 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 1,244 firms, avg revenue/firm $52,288,390 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $8,183,133 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 640 firms, avg revenue/firm $224,003,744 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $35,056,586 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 5,767
caveats: Normalized dataset value lacks MED/HIGH support and is not promoted to DIRECT.

inclusion_criteria: More of the firm's service revenue is attributable to designing and developing bespoke software applications for particular customers than to any other enumerated archetype.
The firm owns delivery of application code or a defined development workstream, whether contracted as a project, dedicated team, or time-and-materials engagement.
The firm is estimated to fall in the $1 million to $10 million EBITDA target band represented by the pinned dataset.
exclusion_criteria: Packaged-software customization or integration is the firm's largest service-revenue category.
Website or database specialty work is the firm's largest service-revenue category.
Temporary staffing, IT technical consulting, or software support is the firm's largest service-revenue category.
The establishment is primarily a software publisher, hosting provider, or computer-systems designer excluded from NAICS 541511 by the Census definition.
target_archetype.selection_basis: Stable archetype IDs were fixed before economic research. The pinned dataset estimates 5,767 target-band firms. For each Census product line, establishment prevalence was multiplied by that line's share of revenue at reporting establishments to form a primary-equivalent firm share, converting overlapping service-line presence into a principal-activity proxy. The base counts are 2,439 custom-application firms, 1,759 packaged-integration firms, 717 web/database specialists, and 470 capacity/consulting/support-led firms, plus a 382-firm residual. Custom application development wins the largest-base rule. Its coverage is 42.297% at base and approximately 32.9%-52.0% using its count range over the 5,767 denominator. Selection uncertainty is true because the selected range overlaps the packaged-integration range; this record remains solely about the selected archetype.

recognized_revenue.rationale: No target-archetype trailing-twelve-month accrual-recognized revenue evidence was supplied.
caveats: Gross billed revenue is not substituted for recognized revenue.

pass_through_reconciliation.rationale: No target accounting evidence establishes the revenue presentation or a pass-through partition.
caveats: The empty packet partition is structural, not evidence that pass-through is zero.

employee_cash_cost.rationale: Frozen source-free value basis assigns 0.75 of one normalized combined cash-cost pool unit to employee cash cost.
caveats: This is not target financial evidence and cannot establish a cash-cost-to-revenue ratio.
employee_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Source-free normalized combined employee-and-controllable-contractor cash-cost pool units; not target dollars.

controllable_contractor_cash_cost.rationale: Frozen source-free value basis assigns 0.25 of one normalized combined cash-cost pool unit to controllable-contractor cash cost.
caveats: This is not target financial evidence and cannot establish a cash-cost-to-revenue ratio.
controllable_contractor_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Source-free normalized combined employee-and-controllable-contractor cash-cost pool units; excludes documented third-party pass-through if later evidenced.

cva_reconciliation.controllable_value_added_boundary: R_cva equals recognized revenue less only documented consideration contractually or economically owed to outside providers and not controlled as value added by the operator. No undocumented amount may be deducted, gross billed revenue is not a substitute, and a deducted cost may not also enter the V numerator.

numerator_costs.accounting_basis: Source-free normalized combined employee-and-controllable-contractor cash-cost pool units; not target dollars.
Source-free normalized combined employee-and-controllable-contractor cash-cost pool units; excludes documented third-party pass-through if later evidenced.

caveats: The empty packet partition is structural, not evidence that pass-through is zero.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: The selected frozen archetype remains customer-specific application development; no NAICS-wide inference is substituted.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: No pass-through category is asserted or deducted without target evidence; later documented pass-through must be partitioned exactly once.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: Role removable fractions describe only the V numerator and do not encode investment, commercial retention, valuation, or survival.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: Implementation investment is retained as a separate missing schedule and is not embedded in removability or commercial retention.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: Customer repricing and commercial sharing remain a separate missing C schedule, distinct from accounting pass-through.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Sale availability, access/win, capacities, and paid entry price are separately missing and are not substituted for one another.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The P anchor binds a null digest only because the canonical year-five state is missing; no alternate state is introduced.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The closed P exclusion map excludes commercial retention and constant-price survival from multiple adjustments.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: The missing basket retains the required fixed-base constant-quality CVA construction and does not use nominal revenue or new demand.

top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing target financial and contract evidence; no bounded range is authored.

reviewer_note: Primitive-only packet. Assumption-mode cash-cost taxonomy and bounded removable-fraction judgments are source-free as frozen; all unsupported target-specific primitives remain MISSING.
